ordinanceLabel: San Anselmo Municipal Code · Municode · Title 9 (Building Regulations) · Title 10 (Planning and Zoning)
fireAgency: Ross Valley Fire Department (RVFD) — Joint Powers Authority serving Fairfax, Ross, San Anselmo, Sleepy Hollow FPD · Plans route through Town Building Dept → RVFD · 10 business day turnaround · prevention@rossvalleyfire.org · (415) 258-4673
utility: PG&E (grid distribution) + MCE Marin Clean Energy (CCA energy provider) · Interconnection through PG&E · MCE is default energy supplier
